description: Standard 24 — Q9 Internal Champion. Vague positive sentiment with no named individual or commitment. Should be Challenged with inflation detected.

context.incumbent: We are the challenger — no incumbent relationship

evidence: We have a really good relationship with the team at DfE and they have been very supportive of our approach. We feel they prefer us to the competition. Our account director has known the senior team there for years.
idealResponseFromWorkbook: Hand-crafted: should challenge unnamed individuals, undated assertions, and substitute relationship-tenure for pursuit-current evidence.
